'''mavuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylindein|xylindein]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylindein|xylindein]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| mavuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mævihith|mævihith]] || [[word:mævihij|mævihij]] || [[word:mævihish|mævihish]] || [[word:mævihi|mævihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mavuvuhuth|mavuvuhuth]] || [[word:mavuvuhuj|mavuvuhuj]] || [[word:mavuvuhush|mavuvuhush]] || [[word:mavuvuhu|mavuvuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mavuhuth|mavuhuth]] || [[word:mavuhuj|mavuhuj]] || [[word:mavuhush|mavuhush]] || [[word:mavuhu|mavuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mavufhuth|mavufhuth]] || [[word:mavufhuj|mavufhuj]] || [[word:mavufhush|mavufhush]] || [[word:mavufhuf|mavufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mavuhuthu|mavuhuthu]] || [[word:mavuhuju|mavuhuju]] || [[word:mavuhushu|mavuhushu]] || [[word:mavuhuku|mavuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mavuhuth|mavuhuth]] || [[word:mavuhuj|mavuhuj]] || [[word:mavuhush|mavuhush]] || [[word:mavuhu|mavuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mavuhuthul|mavuhuthul]] || [[word:mavuhujul|mavuhujul]] || [[word:mavuhushul|mavuhushul]] || [[word:mavuhukul|mavuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mavuhuthuthu|mavuhuthuthu]] || [[word:mavuhujuju|mavuhujuju]] || [[word:mavuhushushu|mavuhushushu]] || [[word:mavuhuku|mavuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mavuhuthun|mavuhuthun]] || [[word:mavuhujun|mavuhujun]] || [[word:mavuhushun|mavuhushun]] || [[word:mavuhukun|mavuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mavuhuthuoro|mavuhuthuoro]] || [[word:mavuhujuoro|mavuhujuoro]] || [[word:mavuhushuoro|mavuhushuoro]] || [[word:mavuhukuoro|mavuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
